figures.caption: Figure 8: Ablation study. Performance comparison of the vLLM baseline, the Naive Classifier, the Smart Classifier, a Naive Aging policy, and RPS-Serve that extends the Smart Classifier with the Priority Regulator.
Figure 2: Characterization of different families of MLLMs.

Figure 10: Performance comparison of RPS-Serve against the baselines across multiple multimodal models, showing normalized latency and TTFT for Sand (S), Pebbles (P), Rocks (R), and Overall (O) requests.
Figure 14: Performance of RPS-Serve under memory pressure.
Figure 13: Performance of RPS-Serve under text-only (TO), multimodal mix light (ML) and high (MH) workloads.
